photos.caption: Poopsie and Pat with the very first Agate Cup.
The toss that decided the 2012 final.
Boards set up on the shore at Rush Lake.
The gallery at Otter Tail Lake.
Final decided as the sun went down.
The year the Cup took Poopsie's name.
The tournament's new home at Island Lake.
The next generation steps up to the boards.
The Agate Cup, engraved with another name.
